case_title: ALKEHM A. SESSION VS. SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SESSION, ALKEHM A. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-02-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-29-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-17-2011
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SESSION, ALKEHM A.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SESSION, ALKEHM A. HEARING SET FOR JUL-27-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SESSION, ALKEHM A.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-27-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF ALKEHM SESSION'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH AN ALTERNATE INSTALLMENT PLAN. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF ALKEHM A. SESSION FILED ON 6/28/11 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-02-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
